primary.name: Guardians of the Globe
primary.short_bio: The Guardians of the Globe are Earth's premier superhero team in the world of Invincible, modeled as that universe's answer to its greatest threats. Across multiple incarnations the team has shifted from a roster of legacy icons to a younger generation rebuilt from tragedy.

eras.title: The Original Guardians
eras.summary: The founding lineup that publicly defended the planet, led by veteran heroes and presented as untouchable protectors. Their era ends in shocking violence that reshapes the entire world.

arcs.title: Global Protectors
arcs.logline: Earth's most trusted superhero team stands as the public face of heroism.
arcs.summary:
The original Guardians of the Globe operate as the world's sanctioned line of defense, a coalition of powerful individuals whose reputations precede them. From their orbital and ground headquarters they coordinate responses to alien incursions, super-criminal rampages, and disasters too large for any single hero.

The roster blends raw power with experience: an ancient warrior, a powered-armor genius, a flying powerhouse, and others whose names are household words. To the public they are a reassuring constant, the team that always shows up when the situation is dire.

This arc establishes the team's place in the world and the trust ordinary people place in them, setting a baseline of stability that later events will violently overturn.

arcs.title: The Fall of the Guardians
arcs.logline: A single betrayal shatters the team the world believed could never be beaten.
arcs.summary:
The era of the original Guardians comes to a sudden and brutal end. What seemed like an unshakable institution is revealed to be terribly vulnerable, and the consequences ripple outward across the entire superhero community.

The aftermath leaves the world without its primary defenders and forces difficult questions about who can be trusted with such power. Allies grieve, investigations begin, and the vacuum left behind demands to be filled.

This arc marks the turning point between the team's first incarnation and everything that follows, redefining the stakes of the series.
arcs.spoiler: Most of the original Guardians of the Globe are killed by the Omni-Man, who reveals his true allegiance.

eras.title: The New Guardians
eras.summary: A rebuilt team assembled from younger heroes and survivors, tasked with restoring the world's faith and filling an impossible void. This generation grows into the role amid constant threats and internal strain.

arcs.title: Rebuilding the Team
arcs.logline: A new generation steps up to wear a legendary name they didn't ask for.
arcs.summary:
With the original team gone, a new Guardians of the Globe is assembled from emerging talents and a few survivors. The recruits are younger, less polished, and acutely aware that they are standing in enormous shadows.

Leadership falls to those willing to shoulder it, and the team must learn to function under pressure while the public watches skeptically. Personalities clash, trust is earned slowly, and every mission doubles as a test of whether the name still means anything.

This arc follows the messy, human process of forging a team out of strangers and grief, laying the groundwork for the modern Guardians.

reading_entries.title: Invincible, Vol. 4: Head of the Class

arcs.title: Guarding the Globe
arcs.logline: The expanded team takes on planet-scale threats as a true global institution.
arcs.summary:
The reformed Guardians grow into a sprawling, well-resourced organization with international reach. New members are recruited, satellite operations are established, and the team begins to function as a genuine worldwide peacekeeping force.

The expanded roster faces escalating dangers, from organized super-crime to existential threats, and the leadership must balance ambition against the cost of stretching themselves thin. Triumphs are real, but so are losses.

This arc cements the new Guardians as worthy successors, carrying the legacy forward while defining their own identity.

reading_entries.title: Guarding the Globe, Vol. 1: Under Siege

start_here.label: Absolute Beginner
start_here.reason: Start where the team is introduced as the world's trusted protectors, before everything changes.

start_here.label: Classic Fan
start_here.reason: The pivotal fall that redefined the entire series and the team's place in it.

start_here.label: Modern Era
start_here.reason: Follow the expanded successor team as a true global institution.

relationships.summary: Invincible works alongside the Guardians repeatedly and becomes one of Earth's most reliable defenders.
relationships.notes: Mark Grayson's path intertwines with the team from its earliest days, often fighting beside them against world-ending threats.

relationships.summary: The Immortal is a longtime leader and anchor of the Guardians across multiple incarnations.
relationships.notes: His millennia of experience make him the steady backbone of both the original and reformed teams.

relationships.summary: Atom Eve is among the most powerful members associated with the team and a key ally in crises.
relationships.notes: Her matter-manipulation abilities make her invaluable in the team's largest battles.

relationships.summary: Robot serves as a strategist and organizer central to rebuilding the team after its collapse.
relationships.notes: His intellect and resources help reconstitute the Guardians into a functioning institution.

relationships.summary: Doc Seismic threatens the planet with seismic catastrophe, drawing the Guardians into direct conflict.
relationships.notes: His earth-shaking schemes make him a recurring large-scale menace the team must contain.

relationships.summary: The Lizard League is a recurring criminal organization the Guardians repeatedly dismantle.
relationships.notes: Their reptilian-themed operatives stage attacks that demand a coordinated team response.

relationships.summary: Machine Head's criminal empire pits organized super-crime against the Guardians.
relationships.notes: As a crime lord commanding numerous super-powered enforcers, he is a persistent strategic threat.

relationships.summary: The Mauler Twins repeatedly clash with the team through their schemes and cloning technology.
relationships.notes: Their genius-level intellect and self-cloning make them an unpredictable recurring danger.

media.title: Invincible
media.notes: The Guardians of the Globe feature prominently from the first season.

media.title: Invincible Presents: Atom Eve
media.notes: A visual-novel RPG set in the Invincible universe featuring team-adjacent characters.

media.title: Invincible VS
media.notes: A fighting game drawing on the Invincible cast, including Guardians members.

team_members.notes: Joins as a powerhouse and one of Earth's most dependable heroes.
Ancient warrior who leads across multiple incarnations of the team.
Matter-manipulator and one of the team's most powerful assets.
Strategist who spearheads the reformation of the team.
Explosive-powered fighter and early member of the reformed roster.
Veteran armored hero who lends experience to the younger team.
Duplicator whose ability to multiply makes her a versatile field asset.

supporting.name: The Immortal
supporting.short_bio: The Immortal is a millennia-old warrior whose regenerative resilience lets him survive nearly any wound. A natural leader, he serves as the steadfast core of the Guardians of the Globe across its incarnations.

eras.title: The Ageless Warrior
eras.summary: Centuries of experience make the Immortal a living legend and a cornerstone of Earth's defense.

arcs.title: The Immortal's Watch
arcs.logline: An ancient hero refuses to let the world fall while he still stands.
arcs.summary:
The Immortal has guarded humanity across countless lifetimes, and his commitment never wavers. As a leader within the Guardians, he provides continuity and resolve when the team is at its most fragile.

His longevity gives him perspective few others possess, and his refusal to stay down makes him a symbol of endurance. He carries old wounds and old grudges, but his loyalty to the team is absolute.

start_here.label: Absolute Beginner
start_here.reason: Meet the team's enduring anchor as he leads through crisis.

relationships.summary: The Immortal leads and anchors the Guardians across multiple rosters.
relationships.notes: His experience and resilience make him the team's steady center.

supporting.name: Atom Eve
supporting.short_bio: Atom Eve is a reality-bending hero able to manipulate matter at the atomic level, restructuring almost anything she can perceive. One of the most powerful figures in her world, she is a close ally of Invincible and the Guardians.

eras.title: Reshaping the World
eras.summary: Eve grows from a teenage hero into one of the planet's most formidable powers.

arcs.title: The Power to Remake
arcs.logline: A young hero learns the true, staggering scope of her abilities.
arcs.summary:
Atom Eve begins as a teenage superhero whose matter-manipulation seems limited, only to discover her power is nearly boundless. Coming to terms with that potential reshapes her sense of responsibility.

Her journey blends personal struggle with world-altering capability, and she becomes a vital ally to the heroes around her, including the Guardians and Invincible.

start_here.label: Absolute Beginner
start_here.reason: See Eve discover the scale of her power from the very start.

relationships.summary: Atom Eve fights alongside the Guardians as one of Earth's most powerful heroes.
relationships.notes: Her abilities make her a decisive force in the team's largest conflicts.

media.title: Invincible Presents: Atom Eve
media.notes: The protagonist of the visual-novel RPG.

supporting.name: Robot
supporting.short_bio: Robot is a brilliant strategist who operates through a drone body controlled from a distance, hiding a complicated truth about his real form. He is instrumental in reforming the Guardians, though his methods are morally ambiguous.

eras.title: The Architect
eras.summary: Robot's intellect drives the rebuilding of Earth's defenses, even as his ethics blur.

arcs.title: Building a Better Team
arcs.logline: A mind without equal sets out to engineer the perfect defense for the world.
arcs.summary:
After the collapse of the original Guardians, Robot takes a leading role in reconstituting the team. His tactical genius and resources make him indispensable, but his willingness to bend rules raises questions.

His arc traces the line between heroic ambition and dangerous overreach, as he pursues an idealized vision of safety that not everyone trusts.

reading_entries.title: Invincible, Vol. 4: Head of the Class

start_here.label: Absolute Beginner
start_here.reason: Watch Robot engineer the reformed Guardians from the ground up.

relationships.summary: Robot leads the reformation of the Guardians and serves as its chief strategist.
relationships.notes: His intellect rebuilds the team, though his methods remain controversial.

media.title: Invincible
media.notes: A key member of the reformed team.

supporting.name: Rex Splode
supporting.short_bio: Rex Splode can charge objects with explosive kinetic energy, making him a volatile close-combat fighter. A brash young member of the reformed Guardians, he matures over time into a dependable teammate.

eras.title: The Young Gun
eras.summary: Rex grows from a cocky recruit into a committed hero of the team.

arcs.title: Live Wire
arcs.logline: A hotheaded recruit learns the cost of carrying a team's trust.
arcs.summary:
Rex Splode joins the reformed Guardians as one of its youngest members, all bravado and explosive power. His early recklessness puts him at odds with teammates, but battle after battle tempers him.

His arc is one of growth, as the cocky kid becomes someone willing to make hard sacrifices for the people beside him.

reading_entries.title: Invincible, Vol. 4: Head of the Class

relationships.summary: Rex Splode is a core member of the reformed Guardians of the Globe.
relationships.notes: His explosive powers and growth define his tenure on the team.

media.title: Invincible
media.notes: A member of the reformed Guardians.

supporting.name: Black Samson
supporting.short_bio: Black Samson is a veteran hero who fights using a powerful suit of armor, lending hard-won experience to the team. After regaining his abilities he returns to active duty as a stabilizing presence.

eras.title: The Veteran
eras.summary: Black Samson brings seasoned judgment to a team of younger heroes.

arcs.title: Back in the Suit
arcs.logline: A seasoned hero returns to the fight to steady a green team.
arcs.summary:
Black Samson rejoins active duty using a formidable suit of armor, bringing maturity to a roster heavy with newcomers. His experience helps anchor the team during chaotic battles.

His arc explores what it means to keep fighting long past one's prime, and the quiet value of a veteran who has seen it all.

reading_entries.title: Invincible, Vol. 5: The Facts of Life

relationships.summary: Black Samson is a veteran member of the reformed Guardians.
relationships.notes: His experience steadies the younger roster in tough fights.

media.title: Invincible
media.notes: Appears as a member of the team.

supporting.name: Dupli-Kate
supporting.short_bio: Dupli-Kate can create numerous duplicates of herself, making her a versatile and resourceful combatant. She is a steady member of the reformed Guardians of the Globe.

eras.title: Strength in Numbers
eras.summary: Dupli-Kate turns a single hero into an entire squad on the battlefield.

arcs.title: Many Hands
arcs.logline: One hero becomes an army when the odds demand it.
arcs.summary:
Dupli-Kate's power to duplicate herself makes her uniquely flexible, able to cover ground and overwhelm foes that would outmatch a lone fighter. She becomes a reliable presence in the reformed Guardians.

Her arc highlights teamwork and adaptability, as she learns to deploy her copies with increasing tactical skill.

reading_entries.title: Invincible, Vol. 4: Head of the Class

relationships.summary: Dupli-Kate is a dependable member of the reformed Guardians.
relationships.notes: Her duplication ability makes her a versatile field asset for the team.

media.title: Invincible
media.notes: A member of the reformed Guardians.

supporting.name: Doc Seismic
supporting.short_bio: Doc Seismic is a megalomaniacal villain who wields gauntlets capable of generating devastating seismic energy. His earth-shaking ambitions repeatedly endanger the planet and bring him into conflict with the Guardians.

eras.title: The Earthshaker
eras.summary: Doc Seismic escalates from a costumed menace into a planet-scale threat.

arcs.title: Fault Lines
arcs.logline: A villain who can shake the earth itself sets his sights on catastrophe.
arcs.summary:
Doc Seismic harnesses seismic energy to terrorize and destroy, growing ever more grandiose in his schemes. His attacks threaten entire regions and force a coordinated heroic response.

His arc is one of escalating destruction, casting him as a recurring large-scale danger the Guardians must repeatedly stop.

reading_entries.title: Invincible, Vol. 5: The Facts of Life

relationships.summary: Doc Seismic's planet-threatening schemes pit him against the Guardians.
relationships.notes: His seismic attacks make him a recurring large-scale menace for the team.

supporting.name: The Lizard League
supporting.short_bio: The Lizard League is a reptilian-themed criminal organization that stages attacks and pursues power through fear and force. Their operatives repeatedly clash with Earth's heroes, including the Guardians of the Globe.

eras.title: Scales of Crime
eras.summary: The Lizard League grows into a recurring criminal threat with shifting leadership.

arcs.title: Cold Blood
arcs.logline: A reptilian crime syndicate strikes wherever the heroes are weakest.
arcs.summary:
The Lizard League operates as an organized villainous force, its themed agents executing schemes that demand a team to oppose them. Leadership disputes and shifting alliances keep them unpredictable.

Their arc establishes them as a persistent thorn in the side of the Guardians, returning again and again with new plots.

relationships.summary: The Lizard League is a recurring criminal organization the Guardians repeatedly fight.
relationships.notes: Their coordinated attacks require a full team response to contain.

media.title: Invincible Presents: Atom Eve
media.notes: Referenced within the Invincible game universe.
